name: Bayou Baked Red Snapper
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the fish and pat it dry.
2. Rub the cavity with salt, pepper, and margarine.
3. Place the fish in a well-greased baking pan and set aside.
4. Heat 3 or 4 tablespoons margarine in a heavy skillet.
5. Add shallots and sauté until soft but not brown.
6. Add more margarine and mushrooms, continuing to cook while shaking the pan until most of the fat is absorbed.
7. Stir in oregano.
8. Pour the mushroom mixture over the fish.
9. Bake at its thickest point for exactly 10 minutes per inch of thickness in a preheated 450°F oven.
10. Baste several times with pan juices.
11. Serves 8 to 10.
